Server.Name: Outback Roadies
Server.Description:
Outback Roadies is a post-poco mod with an Australian theme.
Features Include: - Updated to current version - Custom Entities and Vehicles from the EndZ creators May Red and Thee Legion - Hand Crafted custom Australia Outback 10k World by Fluffy Panda (Shared on his Discord) - Integration for the NPC Mod and includes Spider Add On Pack, Helper FriendZ and Animals - Community Quality of Life Mods - Optional Mods Folder (96 Slot Bigger Backpack Mod, etc.) - Custom Aussie recipes for greater immersion - and a few other bits...
